message:

Since all files are created, I should now verify the project structure and ensure everything is in place. I will list the files to confirm they exist as expected. Then, I will check if there are any missing dependencies or if I need to run any setup commands (like `prisma generate`).

Wait, the scratchpad says "All files created." I should trust this. I will now check the project structure to confirm.
